category_sources: Official GCC site describes GCC as the GNU Compiler Collection.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gcc; official site brands the project as GCC, the GNU Compiler Collection.
docs_sources: Official GCC online documentation page is the canonical documentation index.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GCC git page gives https://gcc.gnu.org/git/gcc.git as the read-only source repository clone URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables include gcc, g++, gfortran, gm2, and related toolchain commands.
